# PERF-82 negative: single StructScan via QueryRowx avoids the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-082-safe.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct {
	ID    int64  `db:"id"`
	Email string `db:"email"`
}

func GetUser(db *sqlx.DB, id int64) (User, error) {
	var u User
	err := db.QueryRowx("SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = ?", id).StructScan(&u)
	return u, err
}
